name: phantom-mcp
description: Access your Phantom embedded wallet from Claude: get addresses, sign transactions, transfer tokens, and swap on Solana.
long_description:
The Phantom MCP server gives Claude direct access to Phantom embedded wallet operations. Authenticate once with Google or Apple, and Claude can:

- **Get wallet addresses** across Solana, Ethereum, Bitcoin, and Sui
- **Sign transactions** on any supported chain
- **Transfer tokens** — SOL or any SPL token on Solana
- **Swap tokens** — fetch quotes and execute swaps via Phantom's quotes API
- **Sign messages** for authentication or proof-of-ownership flows

Uses OAuth + PKCE for secure authentication. Session is stored locally at `~/.phantom-mcp/session.json` and persists across restarts.

tools.name: get_wallet_addresses
tools.description: Gets all blockchain addresses for the authenticated embedded wallet (Solana, Ethereum, Bitcoin, Sui)

tools.name: sign_transaction
tools.description: Signs a transaction using the authenticated embedded wallet. Supports Solana, Ethereum, Bitcoin, and other chains.

tools.name: sign_message
tools.description: Signs a UTF-8 message using the authenticated embedded wallet.

tools.name: transfer_tokens
tools.description: Transfers SOL or SPL tokens on Solana. Builds, signs, and immediately broadcasts the transaction.

tools.name: buy_token
tools.description: Fetches a Solana swap quote from the Phantom quotes API. Optionally signs and executes the swap.

phantom_app_id.title: App ID
phantom_app_id.description: Your Phantom App ID from the Phantom Portal (phantom.com/portal). Required. The email you use to sign in to the Portal must match the email you authenticate with in Claude.

phantom_client_secret.title: Client Secret
phantom_client_secret.description: Optional client secret for confidential OAuth clients. Leave blank to use public client mode (recommended for most users).
